hero.title: Making Intelligence Work for Organizations
hero.subtitle: We design and implement AI and data solutions that improve workflows, support decision-making, and unlock value from organizational data.

quote.line1: Building meaningful AI systems requires more than technology.
quote.highlight: It requires engineering rigor, responsible choices, and trust.

engineering.title: AI as an Engineering Discipline
engineering.description: We treat artificial intelligence as an engineering discipline. Systems are designed with clearly defined objectives, documented assumptions, and measurable evaluation criteria. Particular attention is given to transparency and explainability, ensuring that models remain understandable in their behavior and appropriate for their intended use.

ethics.title: Ethics
ethics.description: Ethics at Ethinc guides how projects are selected, designed, and delivered. We apply a rigorous ethical filter when evaluating engagements, prioritizing work that contributes to constructive and sustainable outcomes. Ethical considerations also shape technical choices, including privacy-aware design and transparent documentation of system capabilities and limitations.

innovation.title: Pragmatic Innovation
innovation.description: We approach innovation with pragmatism and discipline. New technologies are adopted when they offer clear measurable value and can be integrated reliably into operational environments. Experimental ideas are explored through prototypes or proofs of concept before broader deployment. We believe in allowing organizations to innovate while maintaining control and stability.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Trust at Ethinc is built through clarity and transparency in every engagement. Projects are defined with clearly documented objectives, open communication, and structured delivery processes. We prioritize thorough documentation, knowledge transfer, and strict respect for data confidentiality so that clients retain full understanding and control of the systems developed.

aiml.title: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
aiml.description: AI and ML form the analytical core of modern data systems. We apply engineering rigor to design models capable of interpreting complex data, identifying patterns, and supporting informed decision-making across structured and unstructured information.

genai.title: Generative AI & NLP
genai.description: Systems designed to structure and retrieve knowledge, automate document-heavy workflows, and support analytical work. This includes LLM integration, RAG, model fine-tuning, agent systems, multilingual processing, OCR, and multimodal AI.

ml.title: Machine Learning
ml.description: Predictive systems that detect patterns in data for forecasting, anomaly detection, and process optimization. We focus on building models that remain interpretable, reliable, and aligned with real decision processes.

cv.title: Computer Vision
cv.description: Vision systems that interpret visual environments and transform images or video into structured information. From quality inspection to infrastructure monitoring, these systems integrate directly into operational workflows.

graphml.title: Graph Machine Learning
graphml.description: Models that capture relationships between entities — people, transactions, documents, or systems — to reveal patterns traditional analytics miss. Valuable for knowledge graphs, network analysis, fraud detection, and complex data structures.

serviceModel.subtitle: We support organizations at different stages of their AI and data initiatives, from early exploration to system development and long-term operational support.

implementation.title: Implementation
implementation.description: Design and development of AI and data systems. A dedicated consulting and engineering team works with you over an agreed project scope and timeline, from system architecture and development to testing and deployment.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.description: Ongoing technical support for systems previously developed or deployed. A consulting team monitors performance, updates models, improves data pipelines, and adapts systems as operational requirements evolve.

advisory.title: Advisory
advisory.description: Targeted expertise to help organizations evaluate opportunities, structure initiatives, and make informed decisions around AI and data systems. Engagements focus on problem framing, solution design, technical assessment, and implementation planning.

projectDelivery.subtitle: Ethinc projects follow a structured delivery process designed to move from problem framing to reliable operational systems.

research.title: Research & Framing
research.description: Understanding the problem space and defining a viable technical approach. Use-case definition, feasibility assessment, technical evaluation, risk and governance considerations, and prototype validation.

design.title: System Design & Engineering
design.description: Designing the architecture and building the core intelligence systems. AI architecture and data modeling, LLM integration, custom machine learning pipelines, and API-ready modular systems.

deploy.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
deploy.description: Deploying systems within secure and scalable operational environments. Cloud or on-premise infrastructure, secure containerized environments, CI/CD and MLOps integration, monitoring and system reliability.

transfer.title: Knowledge Transfer
transfer.description: Ensuring teams understand, operate, and evolve the deployed systems. Documentation and system handover, internal team enablement, and training workshops.

projectsPage.subtitle: Explore our collection of AI projects that have delivered measurable impact across various industries.

aboutPage.subtitle: We are a team of EPFL alumni and AI specialists based in Lausanne, Switzerland. We combine deep technical expertise with a passion for solving real-world problems through cutting-edge artificial intelligence.
aboutPage.joinSubtitle: We're always looking for talented people who share our passion for AI and want to work on meaningful projects. Get in touch and tell us about yourself.

blogPage.subtitle: Our blog is where we document the ideas, experiments, and observations that emerge from our work. We write about technical findings, industry experiences, and the broader questions surrounding artificial intelligence and data systems.

contactPage.subtitle: Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's discuss your project and explore how we can help.
contactPage.formSubtitle: Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk.
contactPage.subject: Subject
contactPage.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your message and get back to you within 24 hours.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We work across several key domains of AI

nlp.title: Generative AI & NLP
nlp.shortDescription: We design robust generative AI and NLP systems for multilingual, high-volume, and sensitive environments.
nlp.description: We design robust generative AI and NLP systems for multilingual, high-volume, and sensitive environments. Our expertise covers agentic frameworks, LLM fine-tuning and deployment, text classification, entity extraction, summarization, document parsing, and multilingual processing.
useCases: Agentic AI frameworks with LangGraph and LangChain
projects: Built agentic framework with LangGraph for optimal DAG and agent loop runtimes
Fully automated KYC system for Swiss banking sector
Compliant marketing material review system for financial services
Negative news detection in traditional media for risk assessment
Automatic test generation for car interfaces
Multilingual profile & skills embeddings for HR management
Trend detection with sentiment analysis for market intelligence

computerVision.title: Computer Vision
computerVision.shortDescription: We build advanced vision and generative vision models that bring structure and insight to image and video data.
computerVision.description: We build advanced vision and generative vision models that bring structure and insight to image and video data. Our solutions include object detection, image classification, OCR, medical imaging, and custom multimodal pipelines.
projects: Neuron detection in 3D 2-photon microscopy for neuroscience research
OCR and OpenCV for text and layout extraction from documents
Road segmentation models for autonomous driving applications
Real-time object detection for manufacturing quality control

ml.title: Machine Learning
ml.shortDescription: We solve predictive and analytical challenges across structured and unstructured data.
ml.description: We solve predictive and analytical challenges across structured and unstructured data. Our solutions include explainable AI, statistical analysis, forecasting, clustering, and classical ML solutions tailored to your business needs.
projects: Explainable AI for manufacturing production optimization and problem solving
GLM statistical analysis and causal inference for drug effects in pharma
XGBoost models for earnings forecasting in financial services
GMM clustering for client categorization and segmentation
Multilabel classification models for humanitarian text use cases

graphML.title: Graph Machine Learning
graphML.shortDescription: We use graph-based intelligence to reveal hidden relationships and enable complex reasoning over connected data.
graphML.description: We use graph-based intelligence to reveal hidden relationships and enable complex reasoning over connected data. Our expertise includes graph embeddings, fraud detection, biological networks, and large-scale graph processing.
useCases: Graph topology embeddings for fraud detection
projects: Graph topology embeddings for anomalous transaction patterns and fraud detection in banking
Graph embeddings for poisonous protein classification in bioinformatics
Neo4j large graph processing for social media intelligence
Recommendation systems using graph neural networks

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Cutting-edge AI products designed to transform how businesses understand and interact with data while maintaining the highest standards of privacy.

vibeMonitor.title: VibeMonitor
vibeMonitor.subtitle: Social Media Intelligence
vibeMonitor.description: Advanced report generation from social media platforms including Reddit, Twitter, and LinkedIn. Our AI understands and analyzes videos, audio, text, and images to provide comprehensive insights into public sentiment and trends.
features: Multi-platform social media monitoring (Reddit, Twitter, LinkedIn)
Multimedia content analysis (video, audio, text, images)

prism.title: PRISM
prism.subtitle: Privacy-Respecting Retrieval & Information Synthesis Machine
prism.description: A fully local, privacy-first AI platform that analyzes and summarizes diverse document types, supports multilingual processing, and provides verifiable, exportable insights—all while ensuring complete data control.
features: Supports text, media, emails, and multilingual content
Extracts metadata and structured data from documents
Answers include sources and confidence scores
Runs locally or in private cloud, with fine-tuning options

about.title: Our Team
about.subtitle: A team of tech experts with extensive experience in consulting and product development, delivering innovative solutions across diverse industries.
about.description: At Ethinc, we believe in the transformative power of artificial intelligence. Our team of experts combines deep technical knowledge with practical business understanding to deliver AI solutions that drive real results.
about.mission: Our mission is to democratize AI technology and make it accessible to businesses of all sizes.

nizar.name: Nizar Ghandri
nizar.bio: Former GenAI Tech Lead at UBS, specializing in generative AI, end-to-end deployment, and stakeholder management. Combining strong technical expertise with business and sales skills, he drives AI innovation from concept to production.
experience: UBS – GenAI Tech Lead: Led development and deployment of enterprise-grade GenAI solutions with a focus on scalability and impact
Swisscom – Graph ML Researcher: Conducted research in graph-based machine learning and advanced AI systems
Visium – AI Consultant: Delivered ML and data engineering projects across pharma, manufacturing, and banking industries
SAP – Research Collaborator: Worked on NLP for cybersecurity, enhancing enterprise AI capabilities

selim.name: Selim Fekih
selim.bio: AI consultant specializing in the humanitarian sector, with hands-on experience developing NLP solutions and privacy-focused analysis pipelines to address humanitarian challenges. Contributed to platforms like theDEEP and Reporter AI (reporterai.org), building multilingual and locally deployable NLP systems.
experience: AI Consultant for humanitarian organizations and crisis response platforms
Built and deployed NLP pipelines for theDEEP and Reporter AI
Designed privacy-preserving pipelines for sensitive humanitarian data

badis.name: Badis Machraoui
badis.bio: Focuses on the development of our platforms, including AI development, prompt engineering, and software backend. Dedicated to building robust, scalable systems that power our AI solutions.

cta.title: Interested in working with us?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a call and see how Ethinc's AI solutions can help your operations.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to the Ethinc website. By accessing and using this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

section1.title: Website Use
section1.content: This website is provided for informational purposes about Ethinc and our capabilities. You may not use this website for any illegal or unauthorized purpose. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of this website at any time without notice.

section2.title: Intellectual Property
section2.content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and code, is the property of Ethinc and is protected by copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content from this website without our express written permission.

section3.title: Disclaimer and Limitation of Liability
section3.content: This website and its content are provided 'as is' without any warranties, express or implied. Ethinc shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or reliance on the information provided. The information on this website is for general informational purposes and does not constitute professional advice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Ethinc, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

section1.title: Information We Collect
section1.content: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, company name, and phone number when you contact us through our website or engage with our services. We collect this information only when voluntarily provided by you.

section2.title: How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use your information to respond to inquiries, provide our services, communicate with you about projects, and improve our offerings. We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties.

section3.title: Data Security
section3.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.noCookies: We do not use cookies on this website.
cookies.content: Our website does not use cookies or similar tracking technologies. We do not collect any data through cookies, and your browsing experience is not tracked in any way. This means you can browse our site without any concerns about cookie-based tracking or data collection.
